'''Jubei''' was a [[Gender/Legends|male]] [[Weequay/Legends|Weequay]] who, along with [[Gonlo]], was the personal bodyguard of [[Saquesh]] in the aftermath of the [[Jedi Civil War]]. When [[Meetra Surik]] arrived on [[Nar Shaddaa/Legends|Nar Shaddaa]], Jubei, Gonlo, and Saquesh were all [[Death/Legends|killed]] when Saquesh refused Surik's request to leave the refugees that he oversaw alone.

==Behind the scenes==
If the Exile has a high enough persuasion, she can convince Saquesh to give the refugees more space by claiming that one of the refugees, [[Geriel]], has a contagious illness. This is a bluff, since in fact the Exile cures Geriel. In this instance, neither Jubei, Gonlo or Saquesh are killed.

If the Exile chooses to have the refugee Geriel killed by the [[Exchange]] for his illness, Saquesh will order Jubei to take care of it.

==Appearances==
*''[[Star Wars: Knights of the Old Republic II: The Sith Lords]]'' {{1st}}
